verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What a lovely name, The name of Jesus Reaching higher far Than the brightest star. Sweeter than the songs They sing in heaven. Let the saints proclaim, What a lovely name.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Soon He'll come in clouds of glory Saints of every race Shall behold His face. With Him enter heaven's city, Ever to acclaim, what a lovely name.
